title: send_message_now
description: Send a message back to the user via the specified channel. Body MAY include absolute /app/data/... file paths; the channel will deliver each as an attachment.

channel.description: telegram / discord / line / webchat, or 'default' to infer from session_id prefix.

recipient.description: Hashed identity id OR platform-side raw id (manager resolves the mapping).

body.description: Message text. MAY contain absolute /app/data/... file paths to attach.

subject.description: Reserved for channels that support a subject (e.g. email). Chat channels ignore.

app_name.description: ADK app name. Agents normally omit.

user_id.description: ADK user id. Provided by manager when calling.

session_id.description: ADK session id. Used as fallback for channel inference; scopes the notification.
